identity.name: Bar Etc.
identity.address: Leslieville / Gerrard East (1036 Gerrard St E)

narrative.summary: New tropical-leaning cocktail bar from industry heavyweights. Just opened 2026. Intimate, design-forward. 5.0★ (6 reviews — brand new). Cocktail-first, stylish.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on a quiet stretch of Gerrard East in Leslieville, where the streetcar tracks catch the light. Inside, the space is small and deliberate—maybe a dozen seats at most, with a backlit bar where you can watch bartenders work through their ten-day infusions and in-house carbonation setups. The soundtrack leans into the tropical cocktail program without tipping into tiki kitsch, and the design feels considered without being precious.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: This is a cocktail bar first, but the kitchen isn't an afterthought. The menu is tight and unfussy—scallops that consistently steal the show, plus a burger and fried chicken that photograph well and apparently taste better. Everything's meant to keep you drinking through a second or third round. Expect small plates in the mid-teens, mains hovering around the low-twenties.

blocks.title: Go When
blocks.body: Book this for the night you want to try everything on a short cocktail menu with friends who care about what's in the glass. It's new enough that you'll feel like you're in on something, intimate enough that the bartender will remember your order by round two.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "My friends and I LOVED our night here! The cocktails. OMG. The menu is in my pics, and the drinks were ridiculously great. They do so much in house, including carbonation of the highball, and infusions for ten days or more. I had the signature martini, also in my pics, and it was stellar. The food is awesome. We ordered items one through five on the menu, in the pics. Our favourite was the scallops, unanimous and hands down. Nothing disappointed. I took a pic of the burger and chicken at the table beside us, because they looked so good, and they were, according to the people who ate them. Service was fantastic. The space is SUPER cute. The soundtrack, thumbs up. HIGHLY recommend!!!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Welcome Bar Etc to the Hood! So lucky to have a new and inclusive, welcoming, FUN, and fabulous cocktail bar to Gerrard and Jones (steps from the Dineen Coffee). Service was awesome Ziye and the Owner Sasha were amazing. Cocktails 🍹 10/10 and the food bites including the chicken and burger 👍👍 #PerfectSpot #AMustTry"
